scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize()==0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children
pseudocode: TEST TC01 child on empty children

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with one non-Element child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (filtered out, loop with N=1)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("text")); // only TextNode child
pseudocode: TEST TC02 child with no element children

scenarios.description: child(0) returns sole Element child when exactly one Element present
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same instance as child
pseudocode: TEST TC03 child single element child

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with two Element children returns second child (loop N, index in range)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element e1 = new Element("p"); Element e2 = new Element("a"); parent.appendChild(e1); parent.appendChild(e2);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same instance as e2
pseudocode: TEST TC04 child second element child
Element e1 = new Element("p"); Element e2 = new Element("a"); parent.appendChild(e1); parent.appendChild(e2);

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with one Element child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (index >= size)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child);
pseudocode: TEST TC05 child index beyond single element

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with one Element child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (negative index)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child);

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with mixed children returns only Element child at correct filtered index
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("x")); Element elm = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(elm); parent.appendChild(new DataNode("d"));
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same instance as elm
pseudocode: TEST TC07 child mixed node types
